commands.review_summary:
The PR changes group-chat silent-reply gating back to opt-in `silentReplyPolicy: "allow"`, skips `.openclaw-cli-images/` prompt paths during image-reference detection, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +20. Total +25 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main and v2026.5.22 both show `silentReplyPolicy !== "disallow"` for group silent-token guidance, and the image loader path writes `.openclaw-cli-images` paths that the current parser can re-detect; I did not run a live Discord/runtime repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs contributor proof, a narrow code fix for separator coverage, and maintainer acceptance of the reply-policy semantic change before merge; it is not a safe repair-lane candidate while real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: fix(auto-reply, images): restore v5.7 group-chat gating and skip self-written image paths
